description: At Volkswagen of South Mississippi, we make luxury feel warm and familiar. Whether you are exploring new, pre-owned, or certified options, our team is ready to greet you with genuine hospitality. We lead with honesty, attentiveness, and professionalism so you feel confident and cared for throughout your entire experience.  This 2025 Honda Ridgeline RTL is a standout in the mid-size truck segment, offering a compelling blend of capability, comfort, and convenience. With its impressive 3.5L V6 SOHC i-VTEC 24V engine, 9-Speed Automatic transmission, and AWD system, this Ridgeline delivers powerful performance and exceptional versatility. Let's explore the key features that make this truck a true asset for your active lifestyle.   7 Speakers  AM/FM radio: SiriusXM  Radio data system  Radio: 215-Watt Audio System w/7 Speakers  SiriusXM  Air Conditioning  Automatic temperature control  Rear air conditioning  Bluetooth® Hands-Free Link  Power driver seat  Remote keyless entry  The Ridgeline's spacious and well-appointed interior sets it apart from the competition. Sink into the luxurious leather-trimmed seats and enjoy the convenience of dual-zone automatic climate control, keeping you and your passengers comfortable no matter the weather. The available power moonroof lets you soak in the sun or gaze at the stars, while the premium audio system provides an immersive listening experience.  Utility and capability are also at the forefront of this Ridgeline's design. With its 4-Wheel Disc Brakes, ABS brakes, and Traction Control system, you can tackle any terrain with confidence. The Blind Spot Information (BSI) System and Rear Camera further enhance your awareness and maneuverability, making every drive a smooth and secure one.  Beyond its impressive performance and practical features, the Ridgeline also boasts a striking exterior. The sleek Gray paint, complemented by the 18" Pewter Gray Machine-Finished Alloy wheels, gives this truck a bold and sophisticated appearance. Front fog lights and the power-operated moonroof add a touch of refinement, while the Exterior Parking Camera Rear provides added peace of mind when maneuvering in tight spaces.  With its exceptional blend of capability, comfort, and style, this 2025 Honda Ridgeline RTL is the perfect companion for your active lifestyle. We invite you to experience it for yourself and discover why it's the mid-size truck you've been searching for.  You've been searching for the ideal vehicle to meet your needs, and now it's time to take the next step. description: Recent Arrival! This 2026 Chevrolet Colorado Work Truck is a tough, capable midsize pickup built for workdays, weekend projects, and everyday driving. As the entry-level Work Truck trim, it delivers a strong combination of performance, practicality, and value, backed by Chevys latest engineering and modern technology. Under the hood, the 2026 Colorado Work Truck is powered by a 2.7-liter TurboMax inline-4 engine paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission, producing 310 hp and 430 lb-ft of torque one of the most powerful standard engines in the midsize truck class. This work-ready pickup comes with a rear-wheel-drive drivetrain (with 4WD available) and practical capability you can count on. It offers a maximum towing capacity of up to 7,700 lbs and a payload rating around 1,710 lbs, making it highly capable for hauling tools, trailers, equipment, and cargo. Inside, the Colorado Work Truck is designed for daily usability and comfort with features like: 11.3-inch diagonal touchscreen with Google built-in, Apple CarPlay, and Android Auto for seamless smartphone integration. 11-inch digital driver information center with essential vehicle info. Remote keyless entry and keyless start for convenience. Chevy Safety Assist driver-assist technologies including forward collision alert, lane-departure warning, and automatic emergency braking for added peace of mind. description: Recently Arrived | 2026 Jeep Wrangler Willys 4WD | Anvil Clear Coat  Just in at Autobahn Volkswagen in Fort Worth, TX, this 2026 Jeep Wrangler Willys is a recent arrival with only 3,481 miles and an original MSRP of $57,200. Finished in the rugged and modern Anvil Clear Coat, this Wrangler blends legendary off-road capability with premium comfort, advanced technology, and standout Willys-exclusive styling. Thanks to Autobahn Volkswagen's market-based pricing, you can shop with confidence knowing this Wrangler is priced competitively within current market conditions.  Powered by the proven 3.6L V6 24V VVT engine paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission and 4WD, this Willys is built for adventure on and off the pavement. The Quick Order Package 24W Willys elevates capability with a 4.10 rear axle ratio, Dana M210 wide HD front axle, Dana M220 wide rear axle, E-Locker rear axle, Willys suspension, and Off-Road Plus mode, delivering confident performance whether you're tackling trails or cruising highways. The Steel Power Dome Hood Package with a dual-vented hood adds aggressive style and functional design.  Inside, the Convenience Group brings everyday comfort to the iconic Wrangler experience, including heated front seats, a heated steering wheel, automatic climate control, air filtering, and a 7.0-inch TFT color driver display. Technology is front and center with the Uconnect 5 system featuring a massive 12.3-inch touchscreen, Apple CarPlay, Android Auto, SiriusXM with 360L, 8-speaker audio, and a 4G LTE Wi-Fi hotspot-perfect for staying connected wherever the road (or trail) takes you.  Safety and driver assistance features include Enhanced Adaptive Cruise Control, Full-Speed Forward Collision Warning Plus, Advanced Brake Assist, ParkView rear back-up camera, electronic stability control, and a full suite of airbags for added peace of mind. Exterior highlights include LED premium reflector headlamps, LED fog lamps, daytime running lamps with LED accents, 17-inch painted black wheels, deep tint sunscreen windows, black grille with gloss black rings, Willys hood decal, and a durable black 3-piece hard top with Freedom Panel storage bag, rear window defroster, and rear wiper/washer.  When you shop at Autobahn Volkswagen, you'll enjoy a wide variety of pre-owned Volkswagen and Audi models, competitive market-based pricing, and a customer-first experience. We also offer nationwide delivery, making it easy to purchase from anywhere. For additional confidence, extended service contracts are available on this vehicle.  Can't make it to the dealership right away? Ask your sales associate for a virtual walkaround and see this 2026 Jeep Wrangler Willys up close from the comfort of your own home. description: Porsche Little Rock is delighted to showcase, this Certified Pre-Owned 2026 Porsche 911 GT3. Finished in stunning Gentian Blue Metallic over a Leather and Race-Tex Interior in Black with GT Silver Stitching and with just 385 miles, this GT3 pairs motorsport derived engineering with rare specification and driver focused purity, featuring the coveted 6-speed GT Sport Manual Transmission.    The exterior is defined by the Weissach Package, adding extensive lightweight components and exclusive detailing. Highlights include the Front Air Intake Grille with Weissach Package Logo, Weissach Package Logo on Rear Wing Endplates in California Gold, PORSCHE Side Decals in California Gold, and the Exclusive Design Fuel Cap. Track focused usability is enhanced by the Front Axle Lift System and Extended Range Fuel Tank (22.1 gallons). The stance is completed by 20"/21" 911 GT3 Forged Magnesium Lightweight Wheels, while stopping power comes from Porsche Ceramic Composite Brakes with Calipers in High Gloss Black. Visibility and presence are elevated by HD-Matrix Design LED Headlights in Black with White Accent Rings, Exclusive Design Taillights, and BORN IN FLACHT Under Door Puddle Light Projectors.    Inside, the cabin is purpose built for performance driving with Folding Lightweight Bucket Seats, Seat Belts in Silver Grey, and extensive Race-Tex detailing including the Seat Belt Outlet Trims, Center Console Lid with Porsche Crest, and Sun Visors. Additional highlights include the Steering Column Casing in Leather, Pedals and Footrest in Aluminum, Door-Sill Guards in Matte Carbon Fiber, Illuminated, a Fire Extinguisher, and a Storage Net in the Passenger Footwell. Technology and comfort features include BOSE Surround Sound System, ParkAssist (Rear), Ionizer, Ambient Lighting, and the Chrono Package with Porsche Design GT Clock.    Engine and Performance: Powering this 911 GT3 is a 4.0 liter naturally aspirated flat six engine producing 502 horsepower and 346 lb ft of torque, paired with a 6-speed GT Sport manual transmission and rear wheel drive. This high revving powertrain delivers razor sharp throttle response, an engaging analog driving experience, and performance directly derived from Porsche motorsport.    This 2026 Porsche 911 GT3 represents one of the purest driver focused cars Porsche has ever produced, combining the Weissach Package with a manual transmission for maximum engagement and collectability. Available now at Porsche Little Rock.      Porsche Little Rock is a member of the indiGO Auto Group and Arkansas's first and only Porsche Center. Our Porsche Center features a beautiful Porsche Corporate Identity showroom, fully staffed factory certified service center, parts department, finance department, detail department, and Porsche accessories boutique. Allow us to also help arrange transportation of your vehicle directly to your home anywhere in the world. Trade in proposals are always welcome. If you like this vehicle and have questions, simply call, email, or drop by our location at 516 Colonel Glenn Plaza Loop, Little Rock, AR 72210. description: 2018 Ford F-150 King Ranch  Burgundy exterior, Black interior. Powered by the robust EcoBoost 3.5L Twin-Turbo V6 producing 375 hp and 470 lb-ft of torque, paired with Fords smooth 10-speed automatic transmission. This well-maintained truck delivers an EPA estimate of 17 MPG city / 23 MPG highway, is in excellent overall condition and comes with a clean CARFAX.  Key factory-standard highlights and equipment: - Powertrain and chassis: 3.5L EcoBoost Twin-Turbo V6 (375 hp / 470 lb-ft), 10-speed automatic transmission, trailer-focused stability and control systems, four-wheel independent suspension for a comfortable ride and solid towing capability. - Exterior: Distinctive King Ranch styling with premium paint in Burgundy, King Ranch badging and premium trim accents, alloy wheels, chrome exterior touches and integrated running boards for easier access. - Interior and seating: Upscale King Ranch leather-trimmed seating with signature ranch branding and high-quality stitching, comfortable front seats with multiple power adjustments and driver memory settings, supportive rear seating and generous cabin storage  a quiet, well-appointed crew cab designed for long drives and daily tasks. - Comfort and climate: Dual-zone automatic climate control for individualized comfort, power windows and locks, remote start and convenient keyless entry. - Infotainment and connectivity: SYNC 3-based multimedia system with a large touchscreen interface, Bluetooth hands-free phone and audio streaming, USB connectivity and voice controls for safer, easier operation on the road. Smartphone integration and navigation features are supported in typical King Ranch factory configurations. - Convenience and utility: Tow-ready hardware and factory wiring provisions, integrated bed features for cargo management, power-adjustable mirrors and convenient interior cargo hooks and bins to help organize gear and tools. - Safety and driver aids: Comprehensive passive and active safety systems as standard  multiple airbags, anti-lock brakes (ABS), electronic stability/traction control, trailer sway control, rearview camera and tire pressure monitoring. Additional driver-assist options were commonly available from the factory depending on package selection.  This King Ranch combines high-end interior comfort and technology with the proven strength and capability of Fords EcoBoost V6. With excellent overall condition, a clean CARFAX history, and a rich equipment level straight from the factory, this F-150 is well suited for buyers who want luxury features in a capable full-size truck. description: **Experience Comfort and Reliability with the 2018 Kia Optima at 4 Seasons Auto!**  Are you searching for a reliable sedan that can easily accommodate your busy lifestyle? Whether you're commuting to work, running errands, or planning weekend adventures, the 2018 Kia Optima, available at 4 Seasons Auto in Cedar City, UT, is the perfect companion. This stylish and efficient sedan not only offers a comfortable ride for up to five passengers but also delivers impressive fuel economy, making it ideal for budget-conscious buyers.  Located at 940 North Main Street, Cedar City, UT 84720, 4 Seasons Auto is a trusted Buy Here Pay Here dealership that specializes in helping those with less-than-perfect credit. We understand that securing bad credit car loans can be challenging, which is why we offer in-house financing solutions tailored to fit your needs. With our guaranteed approval process, there's no need to worry about being turned away. Our no credit needed options ensure that everyone has a chance to drive home in a reliable vehicle.  The 2018 Kia Optima LX trim is not just about stylish design; it's packed with features that enhance your driving experience. With a robust 2.4L L4 DOHC 16V engine paired with a 6-speed automatic transmission, this front-wheel-drive sedan delivers a smooth and responsive ride. The vehicle has a mileage of just 79,876, making it a fantastic choice for those who value both performance and efficiency. With city MPG ratings of 20 and highway MPG ratings of 30, the Optima is designed to save you money at the pump. description: ### Discover the 2018 Chrysler Pacifica Touring-L: Your Family's Next Adventure Awaits!  Are you on the lookout for a reliable vehicle that perfectly balances comfort, safety, and versatility for your growing family? Look no further than this stunning **2018 Chrysler Pacifica Touring-L** available now at **4 Seasons Auto**, located at **940 North Main Street, Cedar City, UT 84720**. Whether you're embarking on a weekend road trip or navigating daily commutes to work or school, this passenger van is designed to meet the needs of families on the go.  With a spacious interior that comfortably seats **up to 7 passengers**, this Pacifica is ideal for busy families who need room for kids, pets, and all their gear. Featuring a bright white clearcoat exterior and a sleek black/alloy interior, it's not only functional but stylish too. With **111,746 miles** on the odometer, this well-maintained van is equipped for many more adventures ahead.  The **3.6L V6 DOHC engine** provides a smooth and powerful ride, complemented by a **9-speed automatic transmission** for effortless shifting. Whether you're cruising around Cedar City or taking a longer journey, you can enjoy an impressive **19 city MPG and 28 highway MPG**. The front-wheel drive system ensures dependable handling and stability, making it suitable for various driving conditions.  Safety is paramount in the Chrysler Pacifica, and it comes loaded with features to protect your loved ones. Standard **ABS brakes** and **electronic stability control** offer peace of mind, while **blind spot monitoring** enhances visibility on busy roads. Plus, with **child safety door locks** and side airbags for all rows, you can be confident that your family is well-protected.  Inside, the Pacifica doesn't skimp on comfort or technology. The driver's seat is adjustable to suit your preferences, and front heated seats ensure warmth during chilly Utah winters. With **cruise control**, **fog lights**, and a host of other modern conveniences, this van is designed to make every drive enjoyable. Plus, with the **standard power windows** and the **vehicle anti-theft system**, your everyday rides are both convenient and secure.  If you're worried about financing, 4 Seasons Auto is a **buy here pay here dealership**, specializing in **bad credit car loans** and offering **in-house financing** to ensure that you can drive away in your new vehicle without the stress of traditional lending hurdles. With our **guaranteed approval** process, we welcome buyers from all financial backgrounds, making our dealership a perfect fit for those seeking **bad credit and no credit car dealer** options. We offer a variety of **low down payment cars**, allowing you to get behind the wheel without breaking the bank.  This Pacifica is not just a vehicle; it's a lifestyle choice. Whether you're driving to the nearby Iron County Fair or heading up to Cedar Breaks National Monument for a family adventure, this van is ready to take you anywhere your heart desires.   Don't miss out on the chance to upgrade your family's vehicle. Come experience the comfort and functionality of the **2018 Chrysler Pacifica Touring-L** today at **4 Seasons Auto**! Visit us at **940 North Main Street, Cedar City, UT 84720**, or explore your financing options online. We invite you to schedule a test drive and feel the difference for yourself. If you elect to move forward, we can also complete your paperwork wherever you are! Delivery available Nationwide, with FREE delivery within 250 miles! One Owner!     OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:  Preferred Equipment Group 1LZTrailering Equipment ($650 value)Heavy-Duty Cooling System    Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.     At Mike Molstead Motors GM, we're here to Serve you!  Our staff is 100% dedicated to customer satisfaction and we understand that you need clear, transparent information throughout the car buying process.  With our live market pricing philosophy, we offer the right cars at the right price, and the transparency to back it up! description: This 2018 HONDA CR-V EX, has a MODERN STEEL METALLIC exterior and an  interior color. 131,862 miles.  Stock Number 56252A. You can connect with us by calling 956-217-0127.     No Accidents!  One Owner!     OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:      Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.     Cars have been part of the Clark family since 1933 when we opened our first dealership. After building a strong reputation with our family owned and operated business, we have expanded our offerings to include trusted automakers like Honda. Now a 33-year Honda veteran, Clark Knapp Honda is proud to offer friendly service in a beautiful, modern building. Our service department currently staffs 3 SENIOR CERTIFIED MASTER TECHINICANS. Most importantly, it s treating our customers with the respect they deserve. Puklich Chevrolet is a Pre-Discount Dealer . Meaning, we pre-discount all our inventory up front to give you a great deal without the hassle. We do look at all the books like KBB, JD Power, the actual auctions and also Carfax. But most importantly we look at current market conditions and what similar vehicles sold for in our market. We use all these tools to be competitively priced right up front, because the internet and all Third Party sites will tell you if we are a good to great deal. We live and breathe by being transparent! We want your trade and would love to buy any other vehicle you may have! Our Team will look at all the books and auctions. All that information is used while figuring out what reconditioning items your trade in may need to come up with a number that we will honor no matter what vehicle you are on. The best part about this is, even if you donâ??t buy from us, the number we give you is a number we will write you a check for. Puklich Chevrolet pre-owned vehicles are provided with at lease one key. If the previous owner has provided more that that, we will include them with your purchase. Additional keys along with key protection packages are available for purchase at time of sale. Check out the other great features on this vehicle.
